–Of Luke to TheophilusLu 1:1-4;Ac 1:1

SECOND CORINTHIANS, GALATIANS, EPHESIANS, PHILIPPIANS, COLOSSIANS, THESSALONIANS, 
TIMOTHY, TITUS, and PHILEMON.
–Of JAMES, PETER, and JOHN, see books of the N. T. which bear 
their names
